identity.variant: Calvin-40 / current Calvin industrial humanoid platform
identity.notes: 現行Calvin製品ページとWandercraft/Renault公式発表を確認。コード内の40kgは非公式報道由来のため、現行公式ページに数値荷重がない状態では採用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: Wandercraft positions Calvin as a heavy-duty carrier robot that moves heavy loads, handles boxes and crates, and picks small parts with precision; it is described as fully autonomous and intended for factories and logistics hubs.
The current Calvin page says it is designed for heavy loads and precision tasks, is deployed in actual production, and is the first humanoid deployed in Europe for assembly-line production tasks.

Calvin is trained on 12 generic industrial/logistics use cases, three of which the official page says are already deployed; the page describes continuous operation from 8 to 22 hours per day, not a per-charge battery runtime.

mobility.rawValue: Industrial humanoid with autonomous navigation for task execution; designed to handle heavy loads and perform precision tasks
mobility.condition: official product page describes humanoid and autonomous navigation; no non-biped variant value was used
mobility.evidenceSummary: Calvinの現行公式ページがhumanoid、autonomous navigation、task executionを明記。

heightCm.rawValue: No current Calvin height value found on the reviewed official product and Renault partnership pages
heightCm.evidenceSummary: 公式製品ページに身長数値はない。

weightKg.rawValue: No current Calvin robot weight value found on the reviewed official pages
weightKg.condition: heavy-load wording is not robot weight
weightKg.evidenceSummary: 機体重量の公式公開値は確認できない。

speedMps.rawValue: No current Calvin speed value found on the reviewed official product and partnership pages
speedMps.condition: rapid deployment wording is not a speed value
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 速度の公式数値は確認できない。

dof.rawValue: No current whole-body or joint-scope DoF value found on the reviewed official pages
dof.condition: full-body control algorithm is described without DoF count
dof.evidenceSummary: 自由度の公式数値は確認できない。

payloadKg.rawValue: Calvin is described as handling heavy loads, but no numeric payload is published on the current official product page
payloadKg.condition: heavy-load wording is retained as positioning and not converted to scalar payload
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 報道の40kgを現行公式値へ流用せず、scalar payloadを未公開とした。

runtimeMin.rawValue: Designed for continuous operation from 8 to 22 hours per day
runtimeMin.condition: official page describes daily continuous-operation schedule, not battery endurance or a per-charge runtime
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 8〜22時間/日は稼働設計・日次運用時間とも読めるため、電池稼働時間として正規化していない。

batteryCapacityWh.rawValue: No Calvin battery energy capacity in Wh found on the reviewed official pages
batteryCapacityWh.condition: continuous-operation wording is not battery capacity
batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 電池容量Whは確認できない。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: No Calvin charge duration or charger specification found on the reviewed official pages
chargeTimeMin.condition: continuous operation does not establish charge time
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.rawValue: No Calvin battery chemistry, exchange mechanism or electrical specification found on the reviewed official pages
batterySystem.condition: autonomous operation is not a battery-system specification
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 電源・バッテリー方式は確認できない。

controlMethod.rawValue: Autonomous navigation and task execution; full-body control algorithm auto-adapts to the load
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 自律ナビゲーションと荷重適応型全身制御を確認。

sdk.rawValue: No Calvin SDK, developer API or ROS package found on the reviewed official product and partnership pages
sdk.condition: training/control AI description is not an SDK disclosure
sdk.evidenceSummary: SDKの公式公開は確認できない。

computePlatform.rawValue: 3D sensor, vision/recognition stack and reinforcement-learned neural network are described; onboard compute model is not published
computePlatform.condition: AI/software architecture is not an onboard processor specification
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 計算基盤の型番・TOPSは確認できない。

ipRating.rawValue: No Calvin IP ingress-protection rating found on the reviewed official pages
ipRating.condition: industrial-grade reliability wording is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No Calvin operating-temperature range found on the reviewed official pages
operatingTemperature.condition: factory/logistics use is not an environmental range
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: The official page describes an industry-first certifiable safety solution and medical-device-derived quality, but no named Calvin certification or standard is provided
safetyStandard.condition: certifiable safety solution is not the name of a confirmed compliance standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全ソリューションの存在は確認できるが、規格名・認証番号は非公開。

officialUseCases.reason: 公式製品ページがassembly-line production tasksへの配備を明示。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: heavy loads for industry and logistics
officialUseCases.reason: 公式が産業・物流の重量物搬送を明示。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: picks small parts with pinpoint precision
officialUseCases.reason: 公式ホームページが小部品の精密ピッキングを明記し、既存の倉庫ピッキング用途へ接続。

usageExamples.title: High torque. High reliability. Built for the industry.
usageExamples.summary: 現行公式製品ページがCalvinを実際の生産環境に配備済みと説明し、欧州の組立ライン生産タスクでの配備と3件の運用中ユースケースに言及。ただし顧客拠点・作業名・数量は同ページで非公開。

usageExamples.title: Introducing Calvin-40
usageExamples.summary: Renault Groupとの商業提携により、Renault自身の製造業務を起点にCalvinファミリーを開発・量産化する計画を公表。完成導入済みとは区別し、pilot/partnershipとして記録。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Official page states Calvin is deployed in actual production and hundreds of units are ordered for factories and logistics hubs; public order process and price are not published
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 商用生産配備・大量発注の公式記載は確認したが、一般購入条件は非公開。

japanAvailability.rawValue: No Calvin Japan sales, shipment or local fulfillment statement found on reviewed official pages
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での入手性は確認できない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized Calvin distributor identified on reviewed official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Request-a-demo/contact route and industrialization partnership are published; Japan support SLA is not
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式デモ・問い合わせ導線は確認したが国内サポート条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: 現行Calvinページの用途・運用時間・安全記載を確認したが、数値身長・重量・速度・DoF・電池容量・荷重は非公開。
現行ホームページの生産配備・発注・用途表現を確認。
Renaultとの開発・量産提携を確認。

conflicts: Repository data describes a 40kg payload and 350 planned Renault units using non-official reporting; the current official Calvin pages do not publish that numeric payload or quantity, so neither was used as a found value.
humanReviewRequired: Confirm whether the official 8–22 hours/day statement is intended for battery endurance or daily operating schedule.
Confirm current Calvin-40 payload, customer site details and Japan commercial channel with Wandercraft before numeric publication.

identity.variant: MenteeBot V3 / third-generation vertically integrated humanoid robot
identity.notes: Mentee公式V3製品ページとMobileye公式買収発表を確認。非公式データベースのバッテリー・計算基盤値は流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: Mentee describes MenteeBot as a vertically integrated humanoid robot with self-made actuators, onboard sensing/drivers, bespoke electronics and redundant fail-safe compute.
The official product page publishes 175cm height, 70kg weight, 1.5m/s speed, up to 25kg carrying capacity, 40 DoF and voice interaction.
Mobileye describes autonomous task execution without teleoperation, hot-swappable batteries, 24/7 operational availability and planned customer POCs in 2026 with commercialization targeted for 2028.

mobility.rawValue: Third-generation full-size humanoid robot; bipedal mobility is not explicitly stated in the reviewed official specification text
mobility.condition: humanoid identity is confirmed but movement mechanism/locomotion type is not named
mobility.evidenceSummary: 公式ページはhumanoidを明記するが、移動方式をbipedとして明示していない。

speedMps.condition: official page does not label this as maximum or typical
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 公式速度値を表記どおり保持し、最大/通常へ再解釈していない。

dof.condition: whole-body scope is implied by the standalone product spec; sub-scope breakdown is not published
dof.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様の40 DoF。scope内訳は非公開。

payloadKg.rawValue: The official 25kg carrying statement is retained in loadRatings because scope and rating terminology are not specified
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: carry valueをscalarへ流用していない。

runtimeMin.condition: 24/7 availability is a system availability statement, not per-battery runtime
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 24/7を稼働時間・1充電ランタイムへ換算していない。

batteryCapacityWh.rawValue: Hot-swappable battery is published, but battery capacity/energy in Wh is not
batteryCapacityWh.condition: no official voltage or Ah value found
batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 電池容量Whは確認できない。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: Hot-swappable battery is published, but charge duration is not
chargeTimeMin.condition: battery exchange is not charge time
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.condition: official Mobileye release; chemistry, voltage and module capacity are not published
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 交換式電池方式を公式発表で確認。

controlMethod.rawValue: Voice interaction; autonomous end-to-end task execution without teleoperation; human-to-robot mentoring and natural instruction following
controlMethod.normalizedValue: autonomous / voice / mentoring and instruction following
controlMethod.condition: official product page and Mobileye release
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 音声、メンタリング、非テレオペ自律実行を確認。

sdk.rawValue: No MenteeBot SDK, developer API or ROS package found on the reviewed official pages
sdk.condition: mentoring capability and AI architecture are not SDK disclosure
sdk.evidenceSummary: SDKの公式公開は確認できない。

computePlatform.rawValue: Heavy-duty AI workload capability and redundant fail-safe compute are described, but no processor/accelerator model or TOPS value is published
computePlatform.condition: generic compute capability is not a compute-platform model
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 搭載計算基盤の型番・性能値は確認できない。

ipRating.rawValue: No MenteeBot IP ingress-protection rating found on the reviewed official product, blog and Mobileye pages
ipRating.condition: fail-safe wording is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No MenteeBot operating-temperature range found on the reviewed official pages
operatingTemperature.condition: industrial/home positioning is not a temperature range
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: Fail-safe compute and safety-oriented autonomous interaction are described, but no named MenteeBot safety standard or certification is published
safetyStandard.condition: safety architecture is not a compliance standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全標準・認証番号は確認できない。

loadRatings.condition: Official wording is ‘Can carry up to 25kg’; scope is not specified as single-arm, dual-arm or whole-body

officialUseCases.officialExpression: autonomous warehouse task; moving boxes from piles to racks
officialUseCases.reason: 公式ブログが倉庫での箱の移動・棚入れを具体的に示す。
Mobileye公式発表がMenteeの対象環境として工場・倉庫・産業環境を明示。

usageExamples.title: Two MenteeBots Working Together in an Autonomous Warehouse Task
usageExamples.summary: V3のMenteeBot 2台が8つの箱の山から複数ラックへ32箱を移動する倉庫タスクを完全自律で実行し、未編集18分の協調動作を示した公式デモ。顧客導入とは区別。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Official Mobileye announcement says first on-site customer POCs are expected in 2026 and series production/commercialization is targeted for 2028; no current public order or stock terms are published
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 顧客POC・量産計画は確認できるが、現時点の一般調達条件は非公開。

japanAvailability.rawValue: No Japan sales, shipment or local fulfillment statement found on reviewed Mentee/Mobileye official pages
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での入手性は確認できない。

distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式問い合わせは確認したが、導入後支援条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: 公式V3製品ページの身長・重量・速度・DoF・carry・voiceを確認。
POC、量産計画、ホットスワップ電池、自律運用を確認。
倉庫デモを導入事例ではなくdemonstrationとして確認。

conflicts: Official product page gives 24/7 operational availability via hot-swappable batteries in the Mobileye release, but this is not a per-charge runtime.
humanReviewRequired: Confirm whether MenteeBot V3 is explicitly bipedal in the current hardware documentation.
Confirm current commercial price, customer POC status and Japan availability after the Mobileye transaction.

The official Chinese product/application page publishes 55 freedom, 171 CM height and 20 KG dual-arm payload for L7.
Official application labels include research data collection and training, manufacturing, enterprise reception, mall guidance, education/classroom and hospital guidance.

identity.variant: G1 general-purpose mobile dual-arm robot / current G1 documentation version 2.0
identity.notes: Galbot公式G1製品ページ、公式G1クイック使用マニュアル、公式開発者SDKページを照合。G1 Lite/S1の値は流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: Galbot positions G1 as a mobile dual-arm general-purpose robot using a 360-degree omnidirectional-wheel chassis, adaptive height operation and long-reach manipulation.
The official G1 page publishes 1730mm standard posture height, 92.5kg body weight, 1.5m/s maximum speed, 48V 30Ah battery, 8h full-charge runtime, IP54 and AGX Orin 64GB 275TOPS.
Galbot's official developer platform publishes GalbotSDK, G1 documentation and solution packages for reception/guidance, picking and inspection workflows.

mobility.evidenceSummary: 全方向車輪ベースと4輪全方向移動を確認。

heightCm.evidenceSummary: 公式マニュアルの1730mmを173cmへ換算。

dof.rawValue: Product page: total 24 driven joints including 4 chassis drive wheels; developer manual: neck 2 + arms 7x2 + waist 3 + legs 2 = 21 DoF excluding base/end effectors
dof.condition: official documents use different inclusion scope and joint count
dof.evidenceSummary: 製品ページの総数24と、開発者マニュアルの底盤・末端除外21をscope付きで保持。

payloadKg.rawValue: Official single-arm and total end-payload values are retained in loadRatings and not copied to scalar payloadKg
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 荷重をscalarへ流用していない。

runtimeMin.condition: official manual says laboratory test at 60% average speed
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 公式8時間を480分へ換算し、実験室・平均速度60%条件を保持。

batteryCapacityWh.condition: derived from official voltage and Ah: 48 × 30 = 1440Wh; chemistry not published
batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 公式48V・30AhからV×Ahで1440Whを導出し、換算元をrawに残した。

chargeTimeMin.condition: official wired adapter charging time converted from 3.5h

batterySystem.rawValue: 48V 30Ah battery; wired charger standard, wireless charging dock and spare battery optional
batterySystem.normalizedValue: 48V battery with wired charging; wireless dock/backup battery optional
batterySystem.condition: battery chemistry and hot-swap capability are not stated in the reviewed G1 manual
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 電池容量、充電方式、オプション構成を確認。

controlMethod.rawValue: Multimodal voice/target recognition, autonomous return-to-charge, wireless controller/teaching button and developer API
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 音声・対象認識、自律帰充電、操作機器・開発APIを確認。

sdk.rawValue: GalbotSDK; official developer platform provides G1 SDK/Python examples and APIs

operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 公式動作環境の温度範囲。湿度条件もrawに残した。

safetyStandard.rawValue: Official manual describes emergency stop, collision-sensor checks and safe-use warnings; no named G1 safety standard or certification number found
safetyStandard.condition: functional safety instructions are not a compliance standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全機能・注意事項は確認したが規格名・認証番号はない。

loadRatings.condition: Official ‘Dual-Arm End Payload: Single Arm 5kg’; rated/maximum terminology is not stated
Official ‘Dual-Arm End Payload: Total 10kg’; rated/maximum terminology is not stated

officialUseCases.reason: Galbot公式ホームページが製造のassembly・loading/unloading等を明示。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: front-end warehouses: autonomous picking and placement
officialUseCases.reason: G1公式ページが倉庫での自律pick/placeを明示。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: pharmacy: material delivery and retrieval in clinical environments
officialUseCases.reason: 臨床環境の薬局物料搬送・回収を既存の病院内物品搬送へ接続。
小売現場での顧客とのリアルタイムインタラクションを既存受付・接客用途へ接続。

useCaseGaps: USE_CASE_GAP galbot-g1 "Home: cleaning, organizing, fetching and package handling" https://www.galbot.com/

marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 製品・開発・カスタム納入導線は確認したが、一般購入条件は非公開。

japanAvailability.rawValue: No Japan sales, shipment or local fulfillment statement found on reviewed Galbot official pages
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での入手性は確認できない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized Galbot distributor identified on reviewed official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Official developer platform provides GalbotSDK, solution delivery, technical support tiers and a G1 warranty document stating 12 months free warranty from sale
supportNote.evidenceSummary: SDK・運用支援・12か月保証の公式記載を確認。日本向けSLAは非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: 現行G1製品仕様・用途・IP54・電池・算力・荷重を確認。
公式マニュアルで高さ、重量、速度、充電、温度、DoF scope、保証・安全注意を確認。
公式SDK、ソリューション、技術支援・納入フローを確認。

conflicts: Official G1 product page reports total 24 driven joints including chassis drive wheels, while official developer manual reports 21 joint DoF excluding base/end effectors; scope and source version are retained instead of choosing one value.

Product page lists 5.5-inch touchscreen in the specification block while another current page rendering shows 6.25-inch interactive display; this display discrepancy does not affect the requested schema fields.
humanReviewRequired: Confirm the canonical G1 DoF definition/version before publishing a single detail-page value.
Confirm current G1 public price and Japan channel with Galbot; no official public price was found.

identity.variant: Current aeo service robot; historical Japanese deployment releases use the generic name ‘Aeolus Robot’ and do not state an aeo generation
identity.notes: 現行Aeolus公式aeoページ、丸文の戦略パートナー発表、2020/2022導入リリースを確認。旧称の導入機と現行aeoのvariant同一性は公式に明示されていないため、旧導入値を現行仕様へ流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: Aeolus positions aeo as a service robot providing bundled disinfect, care, delivery and security solutions.
The current aeo page describes two arms, autonomous navigation, elevator/door operation, spatial awareness and access through a mobile app.

Aeolus' official Japanese partner Marubun describes the offering as an RaaS platform with installation, operation and maintenance, and reports Japanese care-facility and office-building deployments of the Aeolus Robot.

mobility.rawValue: Advanced mobile service robot with autonomous navigation; current official page does not explicitly name the base as wheeled
mobility.condition: current page describes base mobility/elevator/door traversal but does not publish a mobility mechanism label
mobility.evidenceSummary: 自律移動は確認できるが、現行aeoの車輪方式を公式テキストで確定できない。

usageExamples.title: 除菌機能搭載「アイオロス・ロボット」を日本で初めて介護施設に導入開始
usageExamples.summary: メディカル・ケア・サービスと学研ココファンの計6施設へ順次導入し、UV除菌と夜間各居室巡視・異常通知を実施。リリース上の機体名は現行aeoとの世代対応が未記載。

usageExamples.title: オフィスビルに「アイオロス・ロボット」を初導入～ビルメンテナンス業界の人手不足解消の第一歩へ～
usageExamples.summary: 丸文とグローブシップがRaaS契約を締結し、グローブシップ本社ビルへ導入。局所/広範囲UV除菌と夜間巡回を実施予定として記録。現行aeoとのvariant対応は未記載。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Aeolus offers aeo bundled solutions and flexible leasing/subscription plans; RaaS includes deployment, operation and maintenance rather than a public unit purchase price
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 現行公式のsubscription/RaaS導線と運用支援を確認。

japanAvailability.rawValue: Marubun has an official strategic partnership and reports Japanese deployments of the Aeolus Robot in care facilities and an office building; the releases do not identify the deployed generation as current aeo
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での公式取扱い・導入は確認できるが、現行aeoとのvariant対応は要確認。

distributorJapan.rawValue: Marubun Corporation; official 2019 strategic partnership and handling agreement with Aeolus Robotics
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 丸文とAeolusの戦略的パートナーシップ・取扱開始を公式発表で確認。

supportNote.rawValue: Aeolus describes continuous support, maintenance, repairs and software updates; Marubun provides Japan contact and RaaS deployment/operation/maintenance route
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 現行公式支援と国内パートナー窓口を確認。

sourceCandidates.reason: 現行aeoの用途、二腕、移動、アプリ、AI/センサー機能を確認したが数値仕様はない。
国内戦略パートナー、RaaS、用途、取扱い開始を確認。
介護施設への日本初導入と具体的作業を確認。
オフィスビル導入とRaaS・除菌・巡回作業を確認。

conflicts: Current Aeolus product pages use the name aeo, while Japanese deployment releases from 2020 and 2022 use the generic name Aeolus Robot and do not specify a generation; deployment examples are linked but current-variant equivalence remains unconfirmed.
Repository contains a 150cm height and current Japan-support assertion without a current official aeo numeric/spec source; these values were not used as found evidence.
humanReviewRequired: Confirm whether the 2020/2022 Japanese deployment units are the current aeo variant or an earlier Aeolus Robot generation.
Confirm current aeo height, weight, speed, DoF, payload, battery and safety documentation with Aeolus/Marubun before public numeric display.
